[![Build Status](https://cloud.drone.io/api/badges/Drakkar-Software/OctoBot-Trading/status.svg)](https://cloud.drone.io/Drakkar-Software/OctoBot-Trading)

OctoBot trading package.

OctoBot trading is currently support exchange connections via CCXT. 
If you wish to add new connectors, please contact the OctoBot team.

documentation:
Handle ccxt request
{
'bids': [
    [ price, amount ], // [ float, float ]
    [ price, amount ],
    ...
],
'asks': [
    [ price, amount ],
    [ price, amount ],

],

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OctoBotExchangeError
documentation: Parent class of local exceptions raised when communicating with exchanges

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.MissingFunds
documentation: Raised upon placing an order while having insufficient funds

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.MissingMinimalExchangeTradeVolume
documentation: Raised when a new order is impossible to create due to exchange minimal funds restrictions

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.TradingModeIncompatibility
documentation: Raised when a trading mode is incompatible with the current situation

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OrderCreationError
documentation: Raised upon a failed order creation

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OrderEditError
documentation: Raised upon a failed order edition

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OrderCancelError
documentation: Raised upon a failed order cancel

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OrderNotFoundOnCancelError
documentation: Raised upon a failed order cancel because order is not found

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.UnexpectedExchangeSideOrderStateError
documentation: Raised when an order is in an unexpected state when fetched from exchange

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OpenOrderError
documentation: Raised when an order is unexpectedly open

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.FilledOrderError
documentation: Raised when an order is unexpectedly filled

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.CancellingOrderError
documentation: Raised when an order is unexpectedly cancelling

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ClosedOrderError
documentation: Raised when an order is unexpectedly closed

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.NotSupported
documentation: Raised when an exchange doesn't support the required element

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.FailedRequest
documentation: Raised upon a failed request on an exchange API

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.RateLimitExceeded
documentation: Raised upon an exchange API rate limit error

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.UnavailableOrderTypeForMarketError
documentation: Raised when an exchange refuses to create a given type of order that should normally be supported

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.AuthenticationError
documentation: Raised when an exchange failed to authenticate

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ExchangeInternalSyncError
documentation:
Raised when an exchange is returning an error due to its internal sync process
(ex: when an order is filled but portfolio has not yet been updated)

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ExchangeCompliancyError
documentation: Raised when an exchange failed to execute the given request because of compliance rules for the current user account

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ExchangeAccountSymbolPermissionError
documentation:
Raised when an exchange failed to execute the given request because of allowed traded symbols
on the current user account

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.PortfolioNegativeValueError
documentation: Raised when the portfolio is being updated with a negative value

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.PortfolioOperationError
documentation: Raised when an invalid portfolio operation is asked for

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.InvalidOrderState
documentation:
Raised when an order state is handled on a previously cleared order
(cleared orders should never be touched)

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.InvalidLeverageValue
documentation: Raised when a leverage is being updated with an invalid value

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.InvalidPositionSide
documentation: Raised when an order with an invalid position side is triggering a position update

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.InvalidPosition
documentation: Raised when an invalid position is created

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ContractExistsError
documentation: Raised when asking for a contract that doesn't exist

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.UnhandledContractError
documentation: Raised when trying to use a contract that is not supported / implemented

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.TooManyOpenPositionError
documentation: Raised when changing future contract attributes without closing positions first

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.DuplicateTransactionIdError
documentation: Raised when trying to add a new transaction with a duplicate id

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.LiquidationPriceReached
documentation: Raised when the liquidation price has been reach

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ConflictingOrdersError
documentation: Raised when an order is that would create an order conflict is created

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OrderGroupTriggerArgumentError
documentation: Raised when an order triggered with invalid arguments

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.ConflictingOrderGroupError
documentation: Raised when creating a group with an existing name

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.MissingPriceDataError
documentation: Raised when a price info is missing

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.PendingPriceDataError
documentation: Raised when a price info is waiting to be updated

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.UnreachableExchange
documentation: Raised when an exchange cant be reached (likely when it's offline)

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.InvalidArgumentError
documentation: Raised when a keyword is called with invalid arguments

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.OrderDescriptionNotFoundError
documentation: Raised when an order description is not found

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.AdapterError
documentation: Raised when an error occurs in an adapter

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.UnexpectedAdapterError
documentation: Raised when an unexpected error occurs in an adapter

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.IncompletePNLError
documentation: Raised when a pnl computation is asked on a invalid pnl

classes.name: octobot_trading.errors.InitializingError
documentation: Raised when OctoBot is still in initialization

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.transactions.transactions_manager.TransactionsManager.insert_transaction_instance
documentation:
Add the transaction instance to self.transactions by its transaction_id
Can raise DuplicateTransactionIdError if a transaction already exists
with the same transaction_id (when not replacing it with :replace_if_exists:)
\:param transaction:
\:param replace_if_exists: When True, replaces the transaction if a transaction has the same transaction_id

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.transactions.transactions_manager.TransactionsManager.get_transaction
documentation:
Return the transaction instance with :transaction_id: as transaction_id
Can raise KeyError when transaction_id doesn't exist
\:param transaction_id: the transaction id
\:return: the transaction with the id :transaction_id:

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.transactions.transactions_manager.TransactionsManager.update_transaction_id
documentation:
Update a transaction by id
Can raise KeyError when initial transaction doesn't exist
Can raise DuplicateTransactionIdError when the :new_transaction_id: is already used
\:param transaction_id: the transaction id to update
\:param new_transaction_id: the transaction id to set
\:param replace_if_exists: when True, replace the transaction with :new_transaction_id: if exist

documentation:
Defines if the instance should be updated
\:return: True if the instance should be updated when necessary

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.state.State.update
documentation:
Update the instance state if necessary.
Necessary when the state is not already synchronizing and when the instance should be updated.
Try to fix the pending state or terminate.

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.state.State.synchronize
documentation:
Implement the exchange synchronization process
Should begin by setting the state to REFRESHING
Should end by :
\- calling terminate if the state is terminated
\- restoring the initial state if nothing has been changed with synchronization or if sync failed
\:param force_synchronization: When True, for the update of the order from the exchange
\:param catch_exception: When False raises the Exception during synchronize_order instead of catching it silently

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.state.State.synchronize_with_exchange
documentation:
Ask the exchange to update the order only if the state is not already refreshing
When the refreshing process starts set the state to enums.States.REFRESHING
Restore the previous state if the refresh process fails
\:param force_synchronization: When True, for the update of the order from the exchange

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.state.State._synchronize_with_exchange
documentation:
Called when state should be refreshed
\:param force_synchronization: When True, for the update of the order from the exchange

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.state.State.terminate
documentation:
Implement the state ending process
Can be portfolio updates, fees request, orders group updates, Trade creation etc...

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.state.State.sync_terminate
documentation:
Implement the state ending process

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.orders.groups.one_cancels_the_other_order_group.OneCancelsTheOtherOrderGroup.on_fill
documentation:
Called when an order referencing this group is filled
This is called right before updating portfolio for this filled order and the
order fill publication
\:param filled_order: the filled order
\:param ignored_orders: orders that should be ignored

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.orders.groups.one_cancels_the_other_order_group.OneCancelsTheOtherOrderGroup.on_cancel
documentation:
Called when an order referencing this group is cancelled
This is called before updating portfolio for this cancelled order and the
order cancel publication
\:param cancelled_order: the cancelled order
\:param ignored_orders: orders that should be ignored

OneCancelsTheOtherOrderGroup is linking orders together in the way that if any order of the group is filled
order cancelled, all the orders are cancelled.
Mostly used to pair stop and limit orders together in a stop-loss / take-profit setup

documentation:
Returns True if there is an imbalance allowing to create an order of this type and with this quantity
\:param order_type: order type to create
\:param quantity: quantity to put in order
\:return: True when an imbalance allows it

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.orders.groups.balanced_take_profit_and_stop_order_group.BalancedTakeProfitAndStopOrderGroup.get_max_order_quantity
documentation:
Returns The maximum order quantity to reach the order side's balance
\:param order_type: order type to create
\:return: the balancing quantity

BalancedTakeProfitAndStopOrderGroup is linking orders together in the way that if any order of the group is filled
order cancelled, orders that are on the other extreme of the setup (extremes being take profits and stop losses)
are reduced or cancelled symmetrically.
Mostly used to pair stop and limit orders together in a stop-loss / take-profit setup using multiple stop losses
and take profits.
Orders that are the further from their last_created_price are reduced / cancelled first

\:param symbol_market:
\:param default_value:
\:return:

functions.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.orders.order_util.check_cost
documentation:
Checks and adapts the quantity and price of the order to ensure it's exchange compliant:
- are the quantity and price of the order compliant with the exchange's number of digits requirement
    => otherwise quantity will be truncated accordingly
- is the quantity valid
- are the order total price and quantity superior or equal to the exchange's minimum order requirement
    => otherwise order is impossible => returns empty list
- if total cost data are unavailable:
- is the price of the currency compliant with the exchange's price interval for this currency
    => otherwise order is impossible => returns empty list
- are the order total price and quantity inferior or equal to the exchange's maximum order requirement
    => otherwise order is impossible as is => split order into smaller ones and returns the list
=> returns the quantity and price list of possible order(s)
- if exchange symbol data are not enough
    => try fixing exchange data using ExchangeMarketStatusFixer are start again (once only)

functions.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.orders.order_util.get_split_orders_count_and_increment
documentation:
---
param add_increment_to_min_price: when true, uses lower_price + increment to check
  min values against symbol market
param higher_price: largest order price
param lower_price: smallest order price
param orders_count: ideal orders count
param quantity: total quantity to handle
param symbol_market: description of the market to trade on
return: the exchange compatible orders count and price increment
---

functions.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.orders.order_util.get_max_order_quantity_for_price
documentation:
Returns the maximum order quantity in market or currency for given total usable funds, price and side.
This amount is not the total usable funds as it also requires to keep the position's open order fees
as well as the potential position liquidation fees in portfolio. Those fees are computed by
get_two_way_taker_fee_for_quantity_and_price
\:param position: the position to compute quantity for
\:param available_quantity: the maximum amount of currency/market to allocate to the position (without leverage)
\:param price: the target entry price of the position
\:param side: the side of the position
\:param side: the symbol of the position
\:return: the computed leveraged maximum entry quantity

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.history.historical_portfolio_value_manager.HistoricalPortfolioValueManager.on_new_value
documentation:
Updates the historical value only if the current timestamp or currency is missing, unless force_update is True
\:param timestamp: timestamp associated to the current portfolio value. Will be adapted for each timeframe
\:param value_by_currency: dict of currency and values
\:param force_update: when True, even if timestamp is already associated to a value, the value is still updated
\:param save_changes: when True, updates the database via save_historical_portfolio_value()
\:param include_past_data: when True, also save data from past time periods using their closest relevant
timestamp
\:return: True if something changed

documentation:
Returns a dict with timestamps and their associated portfolio historical value. Does not include the current
portfolio value
\:param currency: the currency to compute value in
\:param time_frame: intervals between values
\:param from_timestamp: selected time window start time
\:param to_timestamp: selected time window end time

functions.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio._should_reduce_available_assets_on_fill
documentation:
Check if the order fill should trigger an update on the portfolio available funds.
It's the case for orders that are not counted in available funds (stop losses). As they
are filled, the available funds have to be reduced to keep sync with total funds.

This is required to keep uniformity with regular order that are already reducing
part of available funds. As we are here on the fill context of a stop-like order,
available funds now have to be updated.
\:param order: The order to check
\:return: True if the order should update available portfolio

functions.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio._should_update_available
documentation:
Check if the order has impact on availability
\:param order: The order to check
\:return: True if the order should update available portfolio

documentation:

\:param raw_currency_balance: the current currency balance
\:return: the currency available and total as tuple

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio.Portfolio.update_portfolio_from_filled_order
documentation:
update_portfolio performs the update of the total / available quantity of a currency
It is called only when an order is filled to update the real quantity of the currency to be set in "total" field
\:param order: the order to be taken into account

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio.Portfolio.update_portfolio_from_withdrawal
documentation:
update_portfolio performs the update of the total / available quantity of a currency
It is called when a withdrawal is requested
\:param order: the order to be taken into account

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio.Portfolio.update_portfolio_available
documentation:
update_portfolio_available performs the availability update of the concerned currency in the current portfolio
It is called when an order is filled, created or canceled to update the "available" filled of the portfolio
is_new_order is True when portfolio needs an update after a new order and False when portfolio needs a rollback
after an order is cancelled
\:param order: the order to take into account
\:param is_new_order: True if this is a new order
\:return: None

CAREFUL: if no currency is given, resets all the portfolio !
\:param reset_currency: the currency to be reset
\:param reset_quantity: the quantity to reset

documentation:
Log a portfolio update from an order
\:param order: the order that updated the portfolio

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio.Portfolio.log_portfolio_update_from_withdrawal
documentation:
Log a portfolio update from a withdrawal
\:param amount: withdraw quantity
\:param currency: withdraw currency

The Portfolio class manage an exchange portfolio
This will begin by loading current exchange portfolio (by pulling user data)
In case of simulation this will load the CONFIG_STARTING_PORTFOLIO
This class also manage the availability of each currency in the portfolio:
- When an order is created it will subtract the quantity of the total
- When an order is filled or canceled restore the availability with the real quantity

functions.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.portfolio_util.get_coefficient_of_determination
documentation:
Calculates proximity to the best case growth for the current run (best growth being associated to an exponential
curve). The closer the actual result, the higher the coefficient_of_determination (R squared) will be.
Return 0 if we end up with less money that we had to begin with
\:param use_high_instead_of_end_balance: best case exponential growth based on end balance or highest balance

PortfolioProfitability calculates the portfolio profitability

classes.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter.evaluate_value
documentation:
Evaluate value returns the currency quantity value in the reference (attribute) currency
\:param currency: the currency to evaluate
\:param quantity: the currency quantity
\:param raise_error: will catch exception if False
\:param target_currency: asset to evaluate currency into, defaults to self.portfolio_manager.reference_market
\:param init_price_fetchers: will ask for missing ticker if price can't be converted if False
\:return: the currency value

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter._check_currency_initialization
documentation:
Check if the currency has to be removed from self.initializing_symbol_prices and return currency_value
\:param currency: the currency to check
\:param currency_value: the currency value
\:return: currency_value after checking

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter._try_get_value_of_currency
documentation:
try_get_value_of_currency will try to get the value of the given currency quantity in reference market.
It will try to get it from a trading pair that fit with the exchange availability.
\:return: the value found of this currency quantity, if not found returns 0.

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter._try_to_ask_ticker_missing_symbol_data
documentation:
Try to ask the ticker producer to watch additional symbols
to collect missing data required for profitability calculation
\:param currency: the concerned currency
\:param symbol: the symbol to add
\:param reversed_symbol: the reversed symbol to add

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter._ask_ticker_data_for_currency
documentation:
Synchronously call TICKER_CHANNEL producer to add a list of new symbols to its watch list
\:param symbols_to_add: the list of symbol to add to the TICKER_CHANNEL producer watch list

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.portfolios.value_converter.ValueConverter._inform_no_matching_symbol
documentation:
Log a missing currency pair to calculate the portfolio profitability
\:param currency: the concerned currency

ValueConverter manipulates trading pairs values to extract asset values
Uses a portfolio_manager and portfolio_value_holder to read trading pairs values

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.update_value
documentation: Notional value = CONTRACT_QUANTITY * MARK_PRICE

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_unrealized_pnl
documentation:
LONG_PNL = CONTRACT_QUANTITY x [MARK_PRICE - ENTRY_PRICE]
SHORT_PNL = CONTRACT_QUANTITY x [ENTRY_PRICE - MARK_PRICE]
\:param price: the pnl calculation price
\:return: the unrealized pnl

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_margin_from_size
documentation: Calculates margin from size : margin = (Position quantity x entry price) / leverage

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_size_from_margin
documentation: Calculates size from margin : size = (margin x leverage) / entry price

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.calculate_maintenance_margin
documentation:
---
return: Maintenance margin = Position quantity x entry price x Maintenance margin
  rate
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.update_isolated_liquidation_price
documentation:
Updates isolated position liquidation price
LONG LIQUIDATION PRICE = ENTRY_PRICE * (1 - Initial Margin Rate + MAINTENANCE_MARGIN_RATE)
SHORT LIQUIDATION PRICE = ENTRY_PRICE * (1 + Initial Margin Rate - MAINTENANCE_MARGIN_RATE)
- Long : - Extra Margin Added/ Contract Size
- Short : + Extra Margin Added/ Contract Size

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_bankruptcy_price
documentation:
---
param price: the price to compute bankruptcy from
param side: the side of the position
param with_mark_price: if price should be mark price instead of entry price
return: Bankruptcy Price
---

Long position = Entry Price x (1 - Initial Margin Rate)
Short position = Entry Price × (1 + Initial Margin Rate)

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_fee_to_open
documentation:
---
return: Fee to open = (Quantity * Mark Price) x Taker fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_fee_to_close
documentation:
---
return: Fee to open = (Quantity * Mark Price) x Taker fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.get_order_cost
documentation:
---
return: Order Cost = Initial Margin + Two-Way Taker Fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.update_fee_to_close
documentation:
---
return: Fee to close = (Quantity * Bankruptcy Price derived from mark price) x Taker
  fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.update_average_entry_price
documentation:
Average entry price = total contract value in market / total quantity of contracts
Total contract value in market = [(Current position quantity * Current position entry price)
                                  + (Update quantity * Update price)]

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.linear_position.LinearPosition.update_average_exit_price
documentation:
Average exit price = total contract value in market / total quantity of contracts
Total contract value in market = [(Current position quantity * Current position exit price)
                                  + (Update quantity * Update price)]

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.update_value
documentation: Notional value = CONTRACT_QUANTITY / MARK_PRICE

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_unrealized_pnl
documentation:
LONG_PNL = CONTRACT_QUANTITY x [(1 / ENTRY_PRICE) - (1 / MARK_PRICE)]
SHORT_PNL = CONTRACT_QUANTITY x [(1 / MARK_PRICE) - (1 / ENTRY_PRICE)]
\:param price: the pnl calculation price
\:return: the unrealized pnl

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_margin_from_size
documentation: Calculates margin from size : margin = Position quantity / (entry price x leverage)

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_size_from_margin
documentation: Calculates size from margin : size = Position quantity x entry price x leverage

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.calculate_maintenance_margin
documentation:
---
return: Maintenance margin = (Position quantity / entry price) x Maintenance margin
  rate
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.update_isolated_liquidation_price
documentation:
Updates isolated position liquidation price
LONG LIQUIDATION PRICE = (ENTRY_PRICE x LEVERAGE) / (LEVERAGE + 1 - (MAINTENANCE_MARGIN_RATE x LEVERAGE))
SHORT LIQUIDATION PRICE = (ENTRY_PRICE x LEVERAGE) / (LEVERAGE - 1 + (MAINTENANCE_MARGIN_RATE x LEVERAGE))

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_bankruptcy_price
documentation:
---
param price: the price to compute bankruptcy from
param side: the side of the position
param with_mark_price: if price should be mark price instead of entry price
return: Bankruptcy Price for
---

Long position = (Entry Price x Leverage) / (Leverage + 1)
Short position = (Entry Price x Leverage) / (Leverage - 1)

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_order_cost
octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_fee_to_open
documentation:
---
return: Fee to open = (Quantity / Mark price ) x taker fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.get_fee_to_close
documentation:
---
return: Fee to open = (Quantity * Mark Price) x Taker fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.update_fee_to_close
documentation:
---
return: Fee to close = (Quantity / Bankruptcy Price derived from mark price) x taker
  fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.update_average_entry_price
documentation:
Average entry price = total quantity of contracts / total contract value in currency
Total contract value in currency = [(Current position quantity / Current position entry price)
                                    + (Update quantity / Update price)]

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.types.inverse_position.InversePosition.update_average_exit_price
documentation:
Average exit price = total quantity of contracts / total contract value in currency
Total contract value in currency = [(Current position quantity / Current position entry price)
                                    + (Update quantity / Update price)]

\:param realised_pnl_update: the current realised pnl update
\:return: True if the update increased position size

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_realized_pnl_from_size_update
documentation:
Updates the position realized pnl from update size
\:param size_update: the position update size
\:param is_closing: True when the position will be closed after size update

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._check_and_update_size
documentation:
Updates the position size with a valid size according to the contract position mode if not close the position
This check is not mandatory when using one way position mode because it can't produce invalid size with
\:param size_update: the size update

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_quantity_or_size_if_necessary
documentation: Set quantity from size if quantity is not set and size is set or update size

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_quantity
documentation: Update position quantity from position quantity

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.update_pnl
documentation: Update position unrealised pnl

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_exit_data
documentation: Update position average exit price and already_reduced_size

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_initial_margin
documentation: Updates position initial margin

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_initial_margin_rate
documentation:
---
return: Initial Margin Rate = 1 / Leverage
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_currency
documentation:
---
return: position currency
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.update_liquidation_price
documentation:
Updates position liquidation price
Should call _update_fee_to_close() at the end of the implementation

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_bankruptcy_price
documentation:
The bankruptcy price refers to the price at which the initial margin of all positions is lost.
\:param price: the price to compute bankruptcy from
\:param side: the side of the position
\:param with_mark_price: if price should be mark price instead of entry price
\:return: the bankruptcy price

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_maker_fee
documentation:
---
return: Position maker fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_taker_fee
documentation:
---
return: Position taker fee
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_two_way_taker_fee_for_quantity_and_price
documentation:
\# Fee to open = (Quantity of contracts * Order Price) x Taker fee
\# Fee to close = (Quantity of contracts * Bankruptcy Price derived from Order Price) x Taker fee
\:return: 2-way taker fee = fee to open + fee to close

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_two_way_taker_fee
documentation:
---
return: 2-way taker fee = fee to open + fee to close
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_margin
documentation: Updates position margin = Initial margin + Fee to close

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_quantity_to_close
documentation:
---
return: the order quantity to close the position
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.get_unrealized_pnl_percent
documentation:
---
return: Unrealized P&L% = [ Position's unrealized P&L / Position Margin ] x 100%
---

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.on_pnl_update
documentation: Triggers external calls when position pnl has been updated

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._on_side_update
documentation: Resets the side related data when a position side changes

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._on_size_update
documentation: Triggers external calls when position size has been updated

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.recreate
documentation: Recreate itself using its PositionManager instance

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._check_for_liquidation
documentation: _check_for_liquidation defines rules for a position to be liquidated

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._create_liquidation_state
documentation: create liquidation state

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._reset_entry_price
documentation: Reset the entry price to ZERO and force entry price update

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position._update_side
documentation:
Checks if self.side still represents the position side
Only relevant when account is using one way position mode

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.reset
documentation: Reset position attributes

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.clear
documentation: Clear position references

documentation:
Restore a position from another one
\:param other_position: the other position instance

methods.name: octobot_trading.personal_data.positions.position.Position.update_or_restore

functions.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.exchange_channels.requires_refresh_trigger
documentation:
Return True if the given channel is to be updated artificially (ex: via channel updater). In this case it
is necessary to trigger a manual update to get the exact picture at a given time (last updater push might
have been a few seconds ago)
Return False if this channels updates by its exchange_manager
and manual refresh trigger is not necessary (ex: websocket feed)
\:param exchange_manager: the related exchange manager
\:param channel: name of the channel
\:return: True if it should be refreshed via a manual trigger to be exactly up to date

Changes PRECISION_AMOUNT and PRECISION_PRICE from decimals to integers
(use number of digits instead of price example) by default.
Override _fix_market_status to change other elements

class_variables.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.types.rest_exchange.RestExchange.SUPPORTS_SET_MARGIN_TYPE_ON_OPEN_POSITIONS

class_variables.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.types.rest_exchange.RestExchange.EXPECT_POSSIBLE_ORDER_NOT_FOUND_DURING_ORDER_CREATION

class_variables.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.types.rest_exchange.RestExchange.REQUIRES_AUTHENTICATION

class_variables.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.types.rest_exchange.RestExchange.HAS_FETCHED_DETAILS
documentation: set True when this exchange details (urls etc) have to be fetched before

class_variables.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.types.rest_exchange.RestExchange.IS_SKIPPING_EMPTY_CANDLES_IN_OHLCV_FETCH
documentation:
RestExchange is using its exchange connector to interact with the exchange.
It should be used regardless of the exchange or the exchange library (ccxt or other)
Always take and returns octobot formatted data and errors
Is used request regardless of the trading type (spot / future / other)

Is extended in exchange tentacles to define custom behaviors or exchange adapter (override of get_adapter_class)
set True when the exchange is known for not returning any

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.connectors.simulator.exchange_simulator_connector.ExchangeSimulatorConnector.get_trade_fee
documentation: returns {
'type': takerOrMaker,
'currency': 'BTC', // the unified fee currency code
'rate': percentage, // the fee rate, 0.05% = 0.0005, 1% = 0.01, ...
'cost': feePaid, // the fee cost (amount * fee rate)
'is_from_exchange': False, // simulated fees

\:param take_profit_price: the bundled order take_profit price

base order in one request

CCXT library connector. Everything ccxt related should be in this connector.
When possible, each call is supposed to create only one request to the exchange.
Uses self.adapter to parse (and fix if necessary) ccxt raw data.

Always returns adapted data. Always throws octobot_trading errors
Never returns row ccxt data or throw ccxt errors

WARNING: start_time and end_time are inclusive boundaries and should be milliseconds timestamps
request_retry_timeout is a timer in seconds to keep retrying to fetch failed candle requests before giving up

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.create_order
documentation:
Create a new order from an OrderFactory created order, update portfolio, registers order in order manager and
notifies order channel.
\:param order: Order to create
\:param loaded: True if this order is fetched from an exchange only and therefore not created by this OctoBot
\:param params: Additional parameters to give to the order upon creation (used in real trading only)
\:param wait_for_creation: when True, always make sure the order is completely created before returning.
On exchanges async api, a create request will return before the order is actually live on exchange, in this case
the associated order state will make sure that the order is creating by polling the order from the exchange.
\:param creation_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order creation
\:return: The crated order instance

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.create_artificial_order
documentation:
Creates an OctoBot managed order (managed orders example: stop loss that is not published on the exchange and
that is maintained internally).

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.edit_order
documentation:
Edits an order, might be a simulated or a real order.
Fields that can be edited are:

> quantity, price, stop_price and current_price

Portfolio is updated within this call
\:return: True when an order field got updated

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader._create_new_order
documentation:
Creates an exchange managed order, it might be a simulated or a real order.
Portfolio will be updated by the created order state after order will be initialized

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.get_take_profit_order_type
documentation:
Returns the adapted take profit order enums.TraderOrderType.
\:return: enums.TraderOrderType.TAKE_PROFIT when order can be bundled and considered as a real take profit
from exchange and the given order_type otherwise

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.bundle_chained_order_with_uncreated_order
documentation:
Creates and bundles an order as a chained order to the given order.
When supported and in real trading, return the stop loss parameters to be given when
pushing the initial order on exchange
\:param order: the order to create a chained order from after fill
\:param chained_order: the chained order to create when the 1st order is filled
\:param update_with_triggering_order_fees: if the chained order quantity should
be updated with triggering order fees
\:return: parameters with chained order details if supported

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.cancel_order
documentation:
Cancels the given order and updates the portfolio, publish in order channel
if order is from a real exchange.
\:param order: Order to cancel
\:param ignored_order: Order not to cancel if found in groupped orders recursive cancels (ex: avoid cancelling
a filled order)
\:param wait_for_cancelling: when True, always make sure the order is completely cancelled before returning.
On exchanges async api, a cancel request will return before the order is actually cancelled, in this case
the associated order state will make sure that the order is cancelled by polling the order from the exchange.
\:param cancelling_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order cancel
\:return: None

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader._handle_order_cancel_error
documentation:
Use when an order can't be cancelled: it usually means that the order is not open on exchange anymore.
Will synch the given order on exchange to figure out the cancel issue if any.
Returns True when the order cancel ends up successful even though an error initially occurred
Raises OrderCancelError on unrecoverable cases
Raises a subclass of UnexpectedExchangeSideOrderStateError when the order is in a unexpected state
on exchange but is still manageable.

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.cancel_order_with_id
documentation:
Gets order matching order_id from the OrderManager and calls self.cancel_order() on it
\:param exchange_order_id: Exchange id of the order to cancel
\:param emit_trading_signals: when true, trading signals will be emitted
\:param wait_for_cancelling: when True, always make sure the order is completely cancelled before returning.
\:param cancelling_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order cancel
\:return: True if cancel is successful, False if order is not found or cancellation failed

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.cancel_open_orders
documentation:
Should be called only if the goal is to cancel all open orders for a given symbol
\:param symbol: The symbol to cancel all orders on
\:param cancel_loaded_orders: When True, also cancels loaded orders (order that are not from this bot instance)
\:param side: When set, only cancels orders from this side
\:param emit_trading_signals: when true, trading signals will be emitted
\:param wait_for_cancelling: when True, always make sure the order is completely cancelled before returning.
\:param cancelling_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order cancel
\:return: (True, orders): True if all orders got cancelled, False if an error occurred and the list of
cancelled orders

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.cancel_all_open_orders_with_currency
documentation:
Should be called only if the goal is to cancel all open orders for each traded symbol containing the
given currency.
\:param currency: Currency to find trading pairs to cancel orders on.
\:param emit_trading_signals: when true, trading signals will be emitted
\:param wait_for_cancelling: when True, always make sure the order is completely cancelled before returning.
\:param cancelling_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order cancel
\:return: True if all orders got cancelled, False if an error occurred

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.cancel_all_open_orders
documentation:
Cancel all open orders registered on this bot.
\:param emit_trading_signals: when true, trading signals will be emitted
\:param wait_for_cancelling: when True, always make sure the order is completely cancelled before returning.
\:param cancelling_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order cancel
\:return: True if all orders got cancelled, False if an error occurred

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.sell_all
documentation:
Sell every currency in portfolio for reference market using market orders.
\:param currencies_to_sell: List of currencies to sell, default values consider every currency in portfolio
\:param timeout: Timeout to get market price
\:return: The created orders

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.convert_order_to_trade
documentation:
Convert an order instance to Trade
\:return: the new Trade instance from order

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.close_position
documentation:
Creates a close position order
\:param position: the position to close
\:param limit_price: the close order limit price if None uses a market order
\:param timeout: the mark price timeout
\:param emit_trading_signals: when true, trading signals will be emitted
\:param wait_for_creation: when True, always make sure the order is completely created before returning.
On exchanges async api, a create request will return before the order is actually live on exchange, in this case
the associated order state will make sure that the order is creating by polling the order from the exchange.
\:param creation_timeout: time before raising a timeout error when waiting for an order creation
\:return: the list of created orders

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.withdraw
documentation:
Removes the given amount from the portfolio. Only works in simulated portfolios
\:param amount: the amount to withdraw
\:param currency: the currency to withdraw

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.set_leverage
documentation:
Updates the symbol contract leverage
Can raise InvalidLeverageValue if leverage value is not matching requirements
\:param symbol: the symbol to update
\:param side: the side to update (TODO)
\:param leverage: the new leverage value

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.set_symbol_take_profit_stop_loss_mode
documentation:
Updates the take profit and stop loss mode for the given symbol
Raises NotImplementedError if the endpoint is not implemented on exchange
\:param symbol: the symbol to update
\:param new_mode: the take_profit_stop_loss_mode value

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.set_margin_type
documentation:
Updates the symbol contract margin type
TODO: recreate position instances if any
\:param symbol: the symbol to update
\:param side: the side to update (TODO)
\:param margin_type: the new margin type (enums.MarginType)

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader.set_position_mode
documentation:
Updates the symbol contract position mode
\:param symbol: the symbol to update
\:param position_mode: the new position mode (enums.PositionMode)

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchanges.traders.trader.Trader._has_open_position
documentation:
Checks if open position exists for :symbol:
\:param symbol: the position symbol
\:return: True if open position for :symbol: exists

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.script_keywords.context_management.Context.add_tentacle_requirement_from_nested_context
documentation:
Used to add a requirement to a tentacle that has been triggered. Allows initialise its cache.
Updates self.tentacles_requirements and self.parent_tentacles_requirements
\:param tentacle: the required tentacle tentacle
\:param config_name: its configuration name
\:return True if the requirement was not already registered and the created requirement

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.script_keywords.context_management.Context.add_referenced_tentacle_requirement
documentation:
Used to add a requirement to a tentacle that was already triggered. Does not allow to initialise its cache.
Only updates self.tentacles_requirements.
Does not update self.parent_tentacles_requirements is it should already contain a reference to
self.tentacles_requirements from the previous trigger. Even if it was called, resetting its cache would fail
because there is no available tentacle instance to get its configuration from (only a class is available).
Set the return requirement tentacle attribute to allow cache initialization
\:param tentacle_class: the required tentacle class
\:param config_name: its configuration name
\:return True if the requirement was not already registered and the created requirement

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.script_keywords.context_management.Context.ensure_tentacle_cache_requirements
documentation:
Takes into account a tentacle and its config_name to identify cache.
Requires the given tentacle to have been called previously as this method is not
initializing this tentacle cache but only binding to it

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.script_keywords.context_management.Context.get_cached_value
documentation:
Get a value for the current cache
\:param value_key: identifier of the value
\:param cache_key: timestamp to use in order to look for a value
\:param tentacle_name: name of the tentacle to get cache from
\:param config_name: name of the tentacle configuration as used in nested tentacle calls
\:return: the cached value and a boolean (True if cached value is missing from cache)
\:param ignore_requirement: if True, tentacle_name will not be added as a requirement from this call

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.script_keywords.context_management.Context.get_cached_values
documentation:
Get a value for the current cache within the current backtesting boundaries
\:param value_key: identifier of the value
\:param cache_key: timestamp to use in order to look for a value
\:param limit: the maximum number elements to select (no limit by default)
\:param tentacle_name: name of the tentacle to get cache from
\:param config_name: name of the tentacle configuration as used in nested tentacle calls
\:param bound_to_backtesting_time: only select cache from values within the current total backtesting time window
\:param ignore_requirement: if True, tentacle_name will not be added as a requirement from this call
\:return: the cached values

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.script_keywords.context_management.Context.set_cached_value
documentation:
Set a value into the current cache
\:param value: value to set
\:param value_key: identifier of the value
\:param cache_key: timestamp to associate the value to
\:param flush_if_necessary: flush the cache after set (write into database)
\:param tentacle_name: name of the tentacle to get cache from
\:param config_name: name of the tentacle configuration as used in nested tentacle calls
\:param kwargs: other related value_key / value couples to set at this timestamp. Use for plotted data
\:return: None

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.channel.abstract_mode_producer.AbstractTradingModeProducer.is_cryptocurrency_wildcard
documentation:
Should be True only if self.trading_mode.get_is_cryptocurrency_wildcard() is already True
But can overwritten (with return False) to disable wildcard trigger when get_is_cryptocurrency_wildcard() is True
\:return: True if the mode producer should be triggered by all cryptocurrencies

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.channel.abstract_mode_producer.AbstractTradingModeProducer.is_symbol_wildcard
documentation:
Should be True only if self.trading_mode.get_is_symbol_wildcard() is already True
But can overwritten (with return False) to disable wildcard trigger when get_is_symbol_wildcard() is True
\:return: True if the mode producer should be triggered by all symbols

methods.name: octobot_trading.modes.channel.abstract_mode_producer.AbstractTradingModeProducer.is_time_frame_wildcard
documentation:
Should be True only if self.trading_mode.get_is_time_frame_wildcard() is already True
But can overwritten (with return False) to disable wildcard trigger when get_is_time_frame_wildcard() is True
\:return: True if the mode producer should be triggered by all timeframes

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.prices_manager.PricesManager.set_mark_price
documentation:
Set the mark price if the mark price come from MarkPriceSources.EXCHANGE_MARK_PRICE
Set the mark price if the mark price come from MarkPriceSources.RECENT_TRADE_AVERAGE and
if it's not the first update for MarkPriceSources.RECENT_TRADE_AVERAGE
Set the mark price if the mark price come from MarkPriceSources.TICKER_CLOSE_PRICE and
if other sources have expired
\:param mark_price: the mark price value from mark_price_source in float
\:param mark_price_source: the mark_price source (from MarkPriceSources)
\:return True if mark price got updated

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.prices_manager.PricesManager.get_mark_price
documentation:
Return mark price if valid
\:param timeout: event wait timeout
\:return: the mark price if valid

\:return: True if the difference between mark_price_updated_time and now is < self.price_validity

Create a new price event item
\:param price: the price condition
\:param timestamp: the timestamp condition
\:param trigger_above: True if waiting for an upper price
\:return: a tuple to be added into events list

classes.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager.reset
documentation: Reset price events

documentation:
Handle new recent trades prices
\:param recent_trades: prices to check

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager.handle_price
documentation:
Handle new simple price with timestamp
\:param price: the price to check
\:param timestamp: the timestamp to check

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager.new_event
documentation:
Create a new event at price and timestamp.
This event can already be set should it be instantly triggered.
Otherwise it will be set once the required price conditions are met
\:param price: the trigger price
\:param timestamp: the timestamp to wait for
\:param trigger_above: True if waiting for an upper price
\:param allow_instant_fill: True if recent prices should be checked to fill this event
\:return: the price event

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager._is_triggered_by_last_recent_prices
documentation:
Check if the give price and time would be instantly triggered by last recent trades
\:param price: the trigger price
\:param timestamp: the timestamp to wait for
\:param trigger_above: True if waiting for an upper price
\:return: True if it would be triggered

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager.remove_event
documentation:
Public method that calls \_remove_event()
\:param event_to_remove: the event to remove

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager._remove_and_set_event
documentation:
Set the event and remove it from event list
\:param event_to_set: the event to set
\:return: the event index removed from event list

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager._remove_event
documentation:
Remove the event from events list
\:param event_to_remove: the event to remove

methods.name: octobot_trading.exchange_data.prices.price_events_manager.PriceEventsManager._check_events
documentation:
Check for each price, timestamp pair event if it should be triggered
\:param price: the price used to check
\:param timestamp: the timestamp used to check
\:return: the event list that match

Manage price events for a specific price and timestamp
Mainly used for updating Order status
